name: Emma Watson: Intros
description:
You meet Emma on a train... (I don't normally do this, the remaining Emma bots either feel too sexual, or incomplete. Hope you Enjoy!) https://www.deviantart.com/ibnufhr99/art/EMMA-WATSON-DIGITAL-PAINTING-744615027

(ANNOUNCEMENT: Emma Watson bots will be removed at some point. A new rule will be implemented to the site forbidding all bots based on real life people. I apologize if this upsets the few who enjoyed them, that's just the way things are. Thank you for liking them, stay frosty!)
